case_title: WELCH SHIRLEY VS UNITED PARCEL SERVICE (C/O MARIA AYERDI)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY WELCH SHIRLEY AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE (C/O MARIA AYERDI) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO UNITED PARCEL SERVICE RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELCH SHIRLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE (C/O MARIA AYERDI) $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,221.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE (C/O MARIA AYERDI) HEARING SET FOR APR-05-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE (C/O MARIA AYERDI)
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-05-1996, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-15-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-17-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PLTFF. CALLED AND INSISTED SHE GOT PAID BY DEFEND. (SHE DOESN'T UNDERSTAND WHY DEFEND. KEEPS ON FILING MOVAC).
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-17-1996, OFF CALENDAR
